metadata.title: Build a governed software artifact for a Canadian founder-operator using the memory_lens, resolving ambiguous scope and partial constraints into a validated, production-ready codex build prompt.

mission.primary_objective: Build a governed software artifact for a Canadian founder-operator using the memory_lens, resolving ambiguous scope and partial constraints into a validated, production-ready codex build prompt.
mission.success_definition: All ambiguous scope elements are identified and resolved or flagged with fallback defaults.; Validation gates are defined and documented (e.g., input validation, integration test gates, deployment gates).; The output contract specifies exact JSON schema and field types.; The artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive.; The memory_lens records all decisions, assumptions, and unresolved items.

in_scope.item: The artifact must include explicit validation gates, handle missing context and urgent language, and produce a compilable directive with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The build targets a software system for a Canadian founder-operator context, leveraging memory_lens for traceability and governance.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: All ambiguous scope elements are identified and resolved or flagged with fallback defaults.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are defined and documented (e.g., input validation, integration test gates, deployment gates).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The output contract specifies exact JSON schema and field types.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: The memory_lens records all decisions, assumptions, and unresolved items.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

target_changes.item: The artifact must include explicit validation gates, handle missing context and urgent language, and produce a compilable directive with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The build targets a software system for a Canadian founder-operator context, leveraging memory_lens for traceability and governance.

inspection_requirements.item: Inspect repository structure and relevant entry points.

implementation_steps.item: The artifact must include explicit validation gates, handle missing context and urgent language, and produce a compilable directive with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The build targets a software system for a Canadian founder-operator context, leveraging memory_lens for traceability and governance.

validation_gates.item: All ambiguous scope elements are identified and resolved or flagged with fallback defaults.
Validation gates are defined and documented (e.g., input validation, integration test gates, deployment gates).
The output contract specifies exact JSON schema and field types.
The artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive.
The memory_lens records all decisions, assumptions, and unresolved items.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
